question: Find the value of x if [1Г·64<sup>(x+2)</sup>] = [4<sup>(xвҲ’3)</sup> Г·16<sup>x</sup>]
solution:
[1Г·64<sup>(x+2)</sup>] = [4<sup>(xвҲ’3)</sup> Г·16<sup>x</sup>]               64<sup>-(x+2)</sup>=[4<sup>(xвҲ’3)</sup>] Г· [16<sup>x</sup>]


breakdown 4,16,64 into a small index no

2<sup>вҲ’6(x+2)</sup> = 2<sup>2</sup>(xвҲ’3)Г·2<sup>4(x)</sup>


2<sup>вҲ’6xвҲ’12</sup> =2<sup>2xвҲ’4xвҲ’6</sup>


2<sup>вҲ’6xвҲ’12</sup> = 2<sup>вҲ’2xвҲ’6</sup>


вҲ’ 6x вҲ’ 12 = вҲ’ 2x вҲ’ 6

Collect the like term

вҲ’6x + 2x = вҲ’6 + 12

вҲ’4x =6

x = 6/4


x = вҲ’3/2

question: Solve x<sup>2</sup> вҲ’ 2x вҲ’ 3 = 0
solution:
x<sup>2</sup> вҲ’ 2x вҲ’ 3 = 0

вҲ’3x + x = вҲ’ 2x

вҲ’ 3x Г— x = вҲ’ 3x<sup>2</sup>

(x<sup>2</sup> вҲ’ 3x)(x вҲ’ 3) = 0

(x вҲ’ 3)(x + 1) = 0

Either (x вҲ’ 3) = 0 or (x + 1) = 0

x = 3 or вҲ’ 1

question: If an investor invest N450,000 in a certain organization in order to yield X as a return of N25,000. Find the return on an investment of N700,000 by Y in the same organization.
solution:

R1 = N 25000

R2 =?

I1 = N 700000

(25000 Г· 450000) = (R2 Г· 700000)

R2 = [(25000 Г— 700000 ) Г· 450000]

= N38,888.90K

вҲҙ The return on a investment of Y = N38888.90K

question: The first and last term of a linear sequence (AP) are 6 and 10 respectively. If the sum of the sequence is 40. Find the number of terms
solution:
nth term of a linear sequence (AP) = a+(n вҲ’ 1)d

first term = 6, last term = 10 sum вҲ’ 40

i.e. a = 6, l = 10, S = 40

S<sub>n</sub> 
= n/2(2a + (n вҲ’ 1)d or Sn = Г·2 (a + l)

S<sub>n</sub> 
 = n/2(a + l)

40 = n/2(6 + 10)

40 = 8n

8n = 40

8n = 40

n = 40/8

= 5

The number of terms = 5

question: Find x if 132<sub>x</sub>  = 70 <sub>eight</sub> .
solution:
132<sub>x</sub> = 70<sub>8</sub>

1 Г— x<sup>2</sup> + 3 Г— x<sup>1</sup> + 2 Г— x<sup>0</sup> 


7 Г— 8<sup>1</sup> + 0 Г—8<sup>0</sup> 


x<sup>2</sup> +3x + 2 вҲ’56 = 0


x<sup>2</sup> + 3x вҲ’54 = 0


x(x + 9) вҲ’6(x + 9) = 0

(x + 9)(x вҲ’ 6) = 0

Either (x + 9) = 0 or (x вҲ’ 6) = 0

x = вҲ’ 9 or +6

The positive values for x = 6

The base number for 132<sub>x</sub>  = 132<sub>6</sub>

Solve the equation 3x<sup>2</sup> вҲ’ 4x вҲ’ 5 = 0
solution:
Using the quadratic formula, we have

x=вҲ’bВұвҲҡ(b<sup>2</sup> вҲ’4ac)/2a
From the equation 3x<sup>2</sup>вҲ’4xвҲ’5 = 0, a = 3, b = -4 and c = -5.

вҲҙx=вҲ’(вҲ’4)ВұвҲҡ((вҲ’4)2вҲ’4(3)(вҲ’5))/2(3)
= 4ВұвҲҡ(16+60)/6
= 4ВұвҲҡ(76)/6
= 4Вұ8.72/6
= 4+8.72/6 or 4вҲ’8.72/6
= 12.72/6 or вҲ’4.72/6
x = 2.12 or -0.79

If log<sub>5</sub>20 = x, find x
solution:
log<sub>5</sub>20 = x

5x = 20(Take log<sub>10</sub> of both sides)

log<sub>5x</sub> = log<sub>20</sub>

xlog<sub>5</sub> = log<sub>20</sub>

x= [log<sub>20</sub> Г· log<sub>20</sub>]

[1.30103 Г· 0.69897]

x = 1.861
